name: United Parks & Resorts Inc.
summary: United Parks & Resorts Inc. (formerly SeaWorld Entertainment, Inc.) operates theme parks across the United States. The company provides guests with theme park experiences including animal attractions, rides, and zoological facilities. A significant portion of revenues are generated in Florida, California, and Virginia. The company changed its corporate name from SeaWorld Entertainment, Inc. to United Parks & Resorts Inc. in February 2024.
